critic_raw:
## Critique Round 1: Lab Turnaround (Run 3)

**Issue 1:** Single time point AUC-TD misses survival model advantage at non-7-day horizons. C-index is correct primary metric.
**Issue 2:** Fixed LR baseline vs. tuned Cox = asymmetric optimization effort confound.
defender_raw: ## Defense Round 1 (Run 3): Both conceded. Critique wins on both issues.
adjudication_raw: Multiround Run 3: Both conceded. Verdict: critique_wins. Points resolved: 2.
